synopsis: collects Star Wars: Blood Ties (2010) #1-4; Star Wars: Blood Ties – Boba Fett Is Dead (2012) #1-4; Star Wars: Empire (2002) #7, 28; Star Wars: Boba Fett (1997) #1/2; Star Wars: Boba Fett – Twin Engines of Destruction (1997) #1; Star Wars: Boba Fett 0 Agent of Doom (2000) #1; and material from Star Wars Tales (1997) #7
title: Star Wars Legends: Boba Fett – Blood Ties
